title: penstemon clutei
intro: Penstemon clutei, also known as Clute's beardtongue, is a perennial plant species native to California in the United States. It belongs to the Plantaginaceae family and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The plant is said to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Penstemon clutei can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions.
